title: IT Support Intern
description: Provide Level 1 IT support at TCS branch offices. Assist employees with hardware issues, software installation, and network connectivity under the PM Internship Scheme.

title: Banking Operations Intern
description: Assist with account opening processes, KYC verification, and customer query resolution at SBI branches across Delhi NCR.

title: Plant Safety Intern
description: Support the safety inspection team at the Jamnagar refinery complex. Document compliance reports and assist in safety drill coordination.

title: Production Line Trainee
description: Work on the vehicle assembly line at the Manesar plant. Learn quality inspection processes and assist senior technicians.

title: Network Field Intern
description: Assist field engineers in mobile tower installation and maintenance. Conduct signal quality tests across Bangalore region.

title: Supply Chain Intern
description: Track product distribution flows from warehouses to retail outlets. Analyze supply chain efficiency data using Excel dashboards.

title: Quality Lab Assistant
description: Assist the quality lab team in testing metal samples. Record results in the digital quality management system.

title: Software Testing Intern
description: Write and execute manual test cases for enterprise software. Learn automated testing frameworks under senior QA engineers.

title: Solar Installation Trainee
description: Assist technicians in installing and maintaining solar panel arrays at NTPC's renewable energy division.

title: Pharmacy Packaging Intern
description: Operate packaging machinery and verify batch labeling accuracy. Maintain production logs for regulatory compliance.

title: Agri-Data Collection Intern
description: Visit rural cooperatives to collect crop yield data and farmer feedback. Enter data into IFFCO's digital monitoring platform.

title: Insurance Processing Intern
description: Process new policy applications. Verify documentation and assist walk-in customers at LIC divisional offices.

title: Civil Site Intern
description: Support on-site project managers with daily progress reports. Learn AutoCAD drafting and safety compliance auditing.

title: Data Entry & Digitization Intern
description: Digitize paper records into electronic databases for government e-governance projects under the PM Scheme.

title: Service Center Intern
description: Learn vehicle diagnostics and repair procedures at authorized Mahindra service centers under PM Internship.

title: Rural Health Outreach Intern
description: Assist mobile health units in rural districts with patient registration and basic health screenings.

title: Warehouse Operations Intern
description: Sort and pack customer orders at the Flipkart fulfillment center. Learn warehouse management systems.

title: Machine Operator Trainee
description: Operate CNC and rolling machines under supervision at JSW's integrated steel plant.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Build responsive web interfaces for client-facing portals. Work with React and modern frontend tech.

title: Pipeline Inspection Intern
description: Assist pipeline integrity engineers with scheduled inspections and documentation at ONGC facilities.

title: Customer Support Intern
description: Handle inbound customer queries via chat and phone for Jio subscribers across India.

title: Retail Store Intern
description: Assist in daily store operations and customer engagement at ITC retail outlets.

title: Digital Banking Intern
description: Support the digital banking team in analyzing transaction patterns and customer behavior data.

title: Electrical Maintenance Intern
description: Assist senior electricians in substation maintenance and power distribution monitoring.

title: Python Backend Intern
description: Develop REST APIs and database queries for internal tools at Tech Mahindra campus.

title: Farm Equipment Maintenance Intern
description: Maintain and repair irrigation pumps, fertilizer dispensers, and farm equipment.

title: Hospital Admin Intern
description: Manage patient records digitization and appointment scheduling at Fortis hospitals.

title: Road Survey Intern
description: Assist survey teams in road quality assessment for national highway projects.

title: Last-Mile Delivery Coordinator
description: Coordinate delivery schedules and route optimization for last-mile operations.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Analyze large datasets using Python. Build visualization dashboards for client reports.

title: Welding Shop Trainee
description: Learn MIG and TIG welding techniques at the SAIL Bhilai steel plant.

title: Clinical Data Intern
description: Enter clinical trial data into electronic systems. Assist in regulatory document preparation.

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description: Create social media content and assist in digital marketing campaigns for Vi telecom.

title: Warehouse Quality Intern
description: Inspect incoming raw materials and outgoing finished goods at Dabur manufacturing plant.

title: Wind Farm Maintenance Intern
description: Assist with wind turbine blade inspection and generator maintenance at Adani's wind farm.
